reasoning: To reach a rating at least 1% higher than 2473, Vaishali Rameshbabu must achieve an Elo of roughly 2498. Gaining 25 rating points requires a massive overperformance (approx. +200 points TPR over 9+ games) against GM-level opposition. While she is capable of such runs (e.g., late 2023 when she crossed 2500), achieving this precisely within the one-month window for the November lists is highly unlikely. Furthermore, Wikipedia's FIDE rankings page may not even be updated by the closely succeeding Nov 2 resolution date, rendering that outcome particularly unlikely. Over a three-month horizon (January 2026 list), her chances increase slightly as she will have more tournament opportunities to accumulate points. Overall probabilities are severely constrained by the mathematical difficulty of rapid Elo inflation at the 2470+ level.
